chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Crl. Misc: Application No.S-47 of 2026 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 1. For orders on office objection (s) 2. For hearing of main case 09.04.2026 Mr.Faisal Nadeem Abro, Advocate for the applicant Mr.Khalid Hussain Lakho, D.P.G for State *********** The applicant has impugned Order dated 11.03.2026, passed by the learned 2nd Additional Sessions Judge, Hyderabad in Crl. Misc. Application No. 01 of 2026. It appears from the impugned order that the Court has observed, in paragraph No.4, that the motorcycle is not the case property. The documents available on record clearly indicate otherwise. In fact, the registered motorcycle is mentioned in the record in relation to the alleged crime, which has been disposed of under “C” Class. In the circumstances, as the only question left before this Court pertains to the ownership of the motorcycle, the impugned order dated 11.03.2026 is set aside. The concerned Court is directed to decide the matter afresh, including verification of the ownership of the said motorcycle. This exercise shall be completed within thirty days from the date of receipt of this order. The office is directed to communicate a copy of this order to the learned 2nd Additional Sessions Judge, Hyderabad, through the District & Sessions Judge, Hyderabad. The instant Crl. Misc. Application stands disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE AHSAN K. ABRO
